trigger: 在厢房内设计与蒋晟发生暧昧被抓包，借机反咬高令宁。

appearance_delta.face: 满脸惊恐与委屈，泪流满面，但眼神深处藏着算计的精光
appearance_delta.body: 瑟瑟发抖，紧紧抱住自己，呈现出受惊吓的防卫姿态
appearance_delta.hair: 发髻完全散乱，长发披散在肩头，珠花掉落
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 凌乱不堪的伪装受害者形象

costume_override.outfit: 外衣脱落，仅穿藕粉色肚兜与凌乱的中衣，香肩半露

visual_reference: A cunning young ancient Chinese woman in disheveled inner garments, outer robe slipping off her shoulder, messy long dark hair, tear-stained face with fake panic, sitting on a messy bed, dramatic indoor lighting, 8k.
emotional_tone: 看似惊恐委屈，实则阴险算计
